```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.4em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.95em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);text-align:left;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.65em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.6em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#DCE9FA,#B5D0F0);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;font-size:0.8em;">PH</div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">co-host 01</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">Pingfan Hu</div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    PhD Candidate, GWU. Heavy Claude Code user.
   </div>
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#3A7DC9;background:#DCE9FA;padding:0.25em 0.65em;border-radius:999px;">↗ pingfanhu.com</span>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);text-align:left;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.65em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.6em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;font-size:0.8em;">JH</div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">co-host 02</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">Dr. John Helveston</div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    Associate Professor, GWU. Open-source educator.
   </div>
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#C4881A;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.25em 0.65em;border-radius:999px;">↗ jhelvy.com</span>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
